description: Long and short breakout strategy that triggers when the 20-period ATR exceeds its 90-day rolling maximum, indicating increased volatility, combined with volume spiking above its 30-day average for confirmation. Entries are taken on the breakout candle close with a 2:1 risk-reward ratio using ATR-based stops.
notes: ATR 90-day high uses 360 bars (90 days * 4 bars/hour * 24 hours/day / 15-min intervals). Volume SMA uses volume column. The 2:1 risk-reward means profit target is 2x the stop distance (stop = 2*ATR, target = 4*ATR). Ensure atr_20_360_max is calculated on rolling basis without lookahead bias.
